title: Vaccine Cold-Chain Vial Packing in a Circular Carrier
strategies: diameter row baseline: one vial filling the carrier / N tiny tangent vials on a diameter (reproduces the checker baseline B = R)
single equal-radius ring of N vials with neighbour-tangent, containment-limited radius
equal-radius hexagonal-lattice packing pushed to the largest radius that still fits N vials inside the carrier
ensemble that emits the better of the ring and hex-lattice constructions per instance, plus interstitial enlargement of unequal vials near the densest known circle-in-circle packings
